Thanks for the PR! A few quick checks before you hit submit:

- External contributions go in `packages/*`, `apps/cli/`, or `examples/*`
  (Apache-2.0). We do not accept external PRs against `ee/*` or `apps/cloud/`.
- The CLA bot will prompt you on your first PR. You must sign before merge.
- For changes to a publishable package, run `pnpm changeset` and commit the
  generated file.
-->
